'''''Valiant''''' was a [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|light Calamari cruiser]] in the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
At the time of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] and immediately after, the vessel was part of the [[Defiance Task Force]] and escaped the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]] along with the rest of the task force's ships after a brief campaign against [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Garreth Holtz]]. It housed most of the task force's wounded, many of whom were probably evacuees from [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
